title: vaccinium reptans
intro: Vaccinium reptans, also known as the creeping bilberry or round-leaved blueberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to northern Europe and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Vaccinium reptans include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and support immune system function. Vaccinium reptans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
